title: Peppery Tender Portuguese Shrimp Toast
description: A crispy, aromatic shrimp toast with a bright peppery kick, finished with a splash of vegan white wine vinegar and fresh parsley.
instructions: In a medium bowl, toss the shrimp with olive oil, smoked paprika, cracked black pepper, lemon juice, vegan white wine vinegar, sea salt, capers, and red pepper flakes until well coated.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat and sauté the seasoned shrimp for 2-3 minutes per side, or until pink and just cooked through (internal temp 140°F/60°C). Remove from heat and set aside.
Meanwhile, arrange the baguette slices on a baking sheet and toast in the oven for 5-6 minutes, or until golden and crispy.
Spread a thin layer of the sautéed shrimp over each toast slice, ensuring an even distribution.
Return the assembled toasts to the oven for an additional 2 minutes to meld the flavors.
Remove from the oven, sprinkle chopped parsley over each toast, and serve immediately while hot and crisp.
